productDisplayName: Calvin Klein Women Secret Obsession Perfume
description: Style NoteSecret Obsession by Cakvin Klein comes in a chocolatey brown flacon, broad at the base and tapering to the top. The people behind this lovely fragrance are Givaudan and Ann Gottlieb, and it was launched in September 2008. Product DetailsThe fragrance opens with top notes of exotic plum, nutmeg (mace) and rose de damasc, blends into heart notes of Egyptian jasmine, French orange blossom and seductive tuberose. The base notes are cashmere woods, Madagascar vanilla, burnt amber and Australian sandalwoodCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
